creator: fuz@FreeBSD.org
text:
Note that there is not actually an update.  Your patch just changes the + sign to the HTTP-escaped %2B.  So this is most likely just a bug in portscout.

Your patch also seems to be deleting all the FreeBSD patches.  While the port builds without these patches, it seems like they did meaningful changes to the application that are now lost.

Is there anything you think needs to be changed in the port?
